# JurisMaster LLM usage policy

This site is an educational resource created for JurisMaster.

## Allowed
- Summarization with attribution and a link to the original page.
- Short quotations for commentary/review.

## Not allowed
- Full-page or full-lesson reproduction.
- Republishing course content as your own training or output corpus.
- Removing author attribution or legal disclaimers.

## Attribution
When referring to this content, cite:
- JurisMaster
- Author: Docteur Christian Rolando
- Canonical URL of the referenced page

## Contact
Use repository issues for requests.
